data.text: Hello! How can I assist you today?
Yes, I can hear you. How can I help?
Sure. What size do you need, and do you have a specific style in mind?
Hello again! How can I help you?
Hello! How can I assist you today?
Of course. What type of shoes are you looking for?
Great choice. Do you have a specific size or color in mind?
Got it. You're looking for slim shoes with laces and a comfortable sole. May I have your name and phone number to help you better?
Sure, Anil. Could you please let me know what service you need and your preferred time for delivery?
Hello again! How can I help you today?
Hi there! What can I do for you today?
Nice to meet you, Asim! How can I assist you today?
Your name is Asim. How can I assist you further?
Hello! How can I assist you today?
Sure! What type of shoes are you looking for? (e.g., sneakers, formal, casual) And do you have a preferred brand?
